rag_rules: Assumptions and guarantees must be placed in component type scopes, not implementations
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Fix unresolved references by correcting or removing invalid AGREE clauses
Ensure AGREE expression types match expected scalar types (int, real, bool)
Validate that AGREE helpers and constants are declared with correct types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts go in annex agree blocks within component types
Avoid package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
anti_patterns: Do not place assume/guarantee statements in component implementations
Do not reference undefined identifiers in AGREE expressions
